meta.description: MCP server container images must not use the :latest tag

assessment.message: All MCP server images use pinned versions

error.message: One or more MCP server images use the :latest tag
error.guidance: Pin container images to a specific version or digest (e.g., ghcr.io/org/image:v1.2.3 or ghcr.io/org/image@sha256:...)
